# Fraud Prevention in E-Commerce Report 2020/2021

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

This year’s large-scale disruption and unpredictable outcomes are putting intense pressure on e-commerce trust and safety teams. The impact on consumer behaviors and digital payment fraud is so far erratic, and shows no signs of leveling out in the near future.

Explore this new report from The Paypers to learn:

*   New ways trust and safety experts are leveraging artificial intelligence and machine learning
*   Emerging trends in payment fraud and the technologies that fight it
*   The impact of PSD2’s SCA (Strong Customer Authentication) regulations on risk mitigation
